return(function(v,y,t,k,m,e,c,Y,b,V,M,o,L,E,n,K,D,W,N,F,A)b,K,E,n,o,L,D,W,V,F,N,A,M,Y=function(v)L[v]=L[v]-(1032556-1032555)if L[v]==6262-6262 then L[v],K[v]=nil,nil end end,{},function(v)local
